query: Get the current Hacker News frontpage posts with at least 100 points. Return the titles and point counts of the top 5.
success_criteria: Returns 5 HN post titles with point counts

query: Search Hacker News for posts about 'Agent Skills'. Return the top 3 results with their titles and URLs.
success_criteria: Returns HN search results about Agent Skills

query: Look up the Hacker News user 'stevekrouse' and tell me their karma score and when their account was created.
success_criteria: Returns dang's karma and creation date

query: Get the latest 5 job postings from Hacker News. Return their titles.
success_criteria: Returns HN job posting titles

query: Get the latest 3 Show HN posts from Hacker News and return their titles and authors.
success_criteria: Returns Show HN post titles and authors

query: Get the current largest item ID on Hacker News.
success_criteria: Returns a numeric item ID

query: Get all teams in my Linear workspace and list their names.
success_criteria: Returns list of Linear team names

query: Get my current Linear user profile — return my name and email.
success_criteria: Returns authenticated user's name and email

query: List all projects in my Linear workspace.
success_criteria: Returns list of Linear projects

query: Search Linear issues with the keyword 'bug'. Return the first 5 results with their titles and states.
success_criteria: Returns Linear issues matching 'bug'

query: List all available contact stages in our Apollo account.
success_criteria: Returns Apollo contact stage names and IDs

query: Check the Apollo API key status to confirm it's working.
success_criteria: Returns API key validation result

query: List all users in our Apollo workspace. Return names and emails.
success_criteria: Returns Apollo user list

query: Get the Apollo API usage stats for our account.
success_criteria: Returns API usage/rate limit info

query: List all opportunity stages configured in our Apollo account.
success_criteria: Returns deal/opportunity stage list

query: Search for Google Spreadsheets with 'benchmark' in the name.
success_criteria: Returns matching spreadsheet names/IDs

query: Create a new Google Spreadsheet titled 'MCP Benchmark Results R2'.
success_criteria: Returns spreadsheet ID/URL

query: Create a SQLite table called 'benchmarks' with columns: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, score REAL, created_at TEXT. Then list all tables to confirm it was created.
success_criteria: Table 'benchmarks' created and visible in table list

query: Write a JSON file called config.json with this content: {"app": "bifrost", "version": "2.0", "debug": false, "port": 8080}
success_criteria: File config.json created with correct JSON content

query: Create the directory structure: project/src, project/tests, project/docs. Then write a one-line README.md in the project/ directory with the text 'MCP Benchmark Project'.
success_criteria: Directories created and README.md written

query: Search the web for 'Bifrost AI gateway' and give me a one-sentence summary of what it is.
success_criteria: Returns a brief description of Bifrost

query: Search GitHub repositories matching 'mcp-server-sqlite'. Return the top 3 results with their names, stars, and descriptions.
success_criteria: Returns GitHub repos matching the search

query: List all Linear workflow states for the first team in our workspace.
success_criteria: Returns workflow states (e.g., Backlog, In Progress, Done)

query: Get today's Hacker News posts with at least 50 upvotes. Just tell me how many there are and the title of the most upvoted one.
success_criteria: Returns count and top post title

query: Search Apollo for organizations matching the domain 'anthropic.com'. Return the company name and employee count.
success_criteria: Returns Anthropic org info from Apollo

query: Get the database schema info from our SQLite database — list all tables and their schemas.
success_criteria: Returns database schema information

query: Search Notion for pages containing 'meeting'. Return the page titles.
success_criteria: Returns matching Notion page titles

query: Get the top 5 Hacker News frontpage stories with at least 100 points, then store them in a SQLite table called 'hn_top_stories' with columns: title TEXT, points INTEGER, url TEXT.
success_criteria: SQLite table created and populated with 5 HN stories

query: Search Hacker News for posts about 'LLM agents' and write the top 5 results (title, URL, points) to a file called hn_llm_agents.txt.
success_criteria: File created with 5 HN search results

query: Get all teams from our Linear workspace and write them to a JSON file called linear_teams.json with each team's name and ID.
success_criteria: JSON file created with Linear teams data

query: List all projects in Linear, then store them in a SQLite table called 'linear_projects' with columns: id TEXT, name TEXT.
success_criteria: SQLite table created with Linear project data

query: Search Apollo for people at the company 'Anthropic'. Return the first 5 contacts and write their names, titles, and emails to a file called apollo_anthropic.txt.
success_criteria: File created with Apollo contact data

query: Get Apollo API usage stats and write the whole information to a file called apollo_usage.txt.
success_criteria: Text file created with Apollo usage stats

query: Search the web for 'Starlark programming language' using Tavily, then save the top 3 result URLs and titles to a SQLite table called 'search_results' with columns: title TEXT, url TEXT.
success_criteria: SQLite table created with search results

query: Search GitHub for repositories matching 'mcp-server' and store the top 5 results (name, description, stars, url) in a SQLite table called 'github_repos'.
success_criteria: SQLite table created with GitHub repo data

query: Get the latest 5 Ask HN story IDs from Hacker News, fetch each story's details, and write a summary to a file called ask_hn.txt with each story's title and author.
success_criteria: File created with Ask HN story summaries

query: Get the Hacker News user profiles for 'birkey' and 'speckx', then store their info (username, karma, about) in a SQLite table called 'hn_users'.
success_criteria: SQLite table created with 2 HN user profiles

query: Create a Google Spreadsheet titled 'HN Top Stories' and add a header row with columns: Title, Points, URL. Then add the top 3 Hacker News frontpage stories as rows.
success_criteria: Spreadsheet created with HN story data

query: Search the web for 'best practices for MCP server development' and write a brief 3-bullet summary to a file called mcp_best_practices.txt.
success_criteria: File created with 3-bullet summary

query: Get all labels from the first team in our Linear workspace and write them to labels.json as a JSON array of objects with name and id.
success_criteria: JSON file created with Linear labels

query: List all Apollo account stages and all contact stages, then write both lists to a file called apollo_stages.txt formatted as two sections.
success_criteria: File created with both stage lists

query: Search Apollo for organizations matching 'OpenAI' and store the results (name, domain, employee_count) in a SQLite table called 'apollo_orgs'.
success_criteria: SQLite table created with Apollo org data

query: Get the recently changed items from Hacker News (updates endpoint) and write the first 10 item IDs and first 5 changed profile usernames to a file called hn_updates.txt.
success_criteria: File created with recent HN updates

query: Search GitHub issues in the repo 'modelcontextprotocol/specification' with the keyword 'transport'. Return the first 5 issue titles and their states.
success_criteria: Returns GitHub issues about transport

query: Create a Notion page titled 'R2 Benchmark Notes' with the content: 'Round 2 benchmark with 251 tools across 11 MCP servers. Testing token reduction at scale.'
success_criteria: Notion page created with specified content

query: Search the web for 'Apollo.io CRM API' and store the top 3 result titles and URLs in a SQLite table called 'web_results' with columns title TEXT, url TEXT.
success_criteria: SQLite table created with web search results

query: Get the file listing of the current directory and write it to a file called directory_snapshot.txt.
success_criteria: File created with directory listing

query: Search Apollo for people with the title 'CTO' and store the first 5 results (name, title, company) in a SQLite table called 'apollo_ctos'.
success_criteria: SQLite table created with Apollo CTO contacts

query: Get all Linear workflow states for the first team, then create a SQLite table called 'linear_states' with columns: id TEXT, name TEXT, type TEXT and insert all states.
success_criteria: SQLite table created with Linear workflow states

query: Search Hacker News for posts about 'Rust programming' by type 'story', and write a file called hn_rust.json containing the top 5 results as a JSON array with fields: title, author, points, url.
success_criteria: JSON file created with HN Rust story data

query: Get the latest 3 new stories from Hacker News, fetch their details, and store them in a SQLite table called 'hn_latest' with columns: id INTEGER, title TEXT, author TEXT, score INTEGER, url TEXT.
success_criteria: SQLite table created with latest HN stories

query: Create a Linear issue titled 'Benchmark R2: Investigate token inflation' with description 'Investigate queries where Code Mode ON uses more tokens than OFF.' in the first team of our workspace.
success_criteria: Linear issue created with correct title and description

query: Get the Hacker News frontpage posts with 100+ points, search GitHub for repos matching the title of the top post, and write the GitHub search results (repo name, stars, description) to a file called hn_github_crossref.txt.
success_criteria: File created with GitHub repos related to top HN post

query: Get all Linear teams and their members, then search Apollo for the email domain of the first team member found. Write a brief report to team_lookup.txt.
success_criteria: File created with cross-referenced team/Apollo data

query: Search the web for 'top AI startups 2025', get the top 3 results, then search Apollo for organizations matching each company name. Store all results in a SQLite table called 'ai_startups' with columns: name TEXT, domain TEXT, source TEXT.
success_criteria: SQLite table with AI startup data from web + Apollo

query: Get the top 3 HN frontpage stories, search the web for more context on the #1 story using Tavily, and write a combined summary (title, HN points, and web context in under 100 words) to hn_deep_dive.txt.
success_criteria: File with HN story + web context summary

query: Get all Linear projects, get all Apollo opportunity stages, and create a SQLite table called 'pipeline_mapping' with columns: linear_project TEXT, apollo_stage TEXT. Insert one row per Linear project, paired with 'Prospecting' as the default Apollo stage.
success_criteria: SQLite table mapping Linear projects to Apollo stages

query: Search GitHub for repos matching 'hacker-news-api', then search HN for posts about the top repo's name. Write both result sets to a file called github_hn_crossref.txt.
success_criteria: File with GitHub repos and related HN discussions

query: Create a Google Spreadsheet titled 'Apollo Contacts Export', add headers (Name, Title, Company, Email), then search Apollo for 3 people at 'Google' and add them as rows.
success_criteria: Spreadsheet created with Apollo contact data

query: Search HN for posts about 'MCP server', get the top result's details, and create a Notion page titled 'MCP on HN' summarizing the post (title, author, points, and a one-line description).
success_criteria: Notion page created with HN post summary

query: Get the HN user profile for 'pg', search GitHub for repositories owned by 'paulgraham', and write a combined profile to pg_profile.txt with their HN karma and GitHub repos.
success_criteria: File with combined HN + GitHub profile

query: Search the web for 'Linear project management API', take the top 3 results, and store them alongside all Linear team names in a SQLite table called 'linear_research' with columns: type TEXT ('web' or 'team'), name TEXT, url TEXT.
success_criteria: SQLite table with web results and team names

query: Get the latest 3 HN job postings, then search Apollo for organizations matching each company name mentioned. Write a report to hn_jobs_apollo.txt mapping each job to the Apollo org data found (or 'not found').
success_criteria: File mapping HN jobs to Apollo org data

query: Create a Google Spreadsheet titled 'Linear Project Tracker', add headers (Project Name, Project ID, Team), then populate it with all projects from our Linear workspace.
success_criteria: Spreadsheet created and populated with Linear project data

query: Search Notion for pages containing 'project', then get the file listing from the current directory, and write a combined inventory to inventory.txt listing both Notion pages and local files.
success_criteria: File with combined Notion + filesystem inventory
